Name: ffmpeg
Description: Complete solution to record, convert and stream audio and video
Provides: libavcodec.so libavdevice.so libavfilter.so libavformat.so libavutil.so libpostproc.so libswresample.so libswscale.so
Depends On: alsa-lib freetype2 fribidi gmp libdrm libpulse mesa libopus libsrt libvorbis sdl2 libx264 libx265 xz zlib libva libass librsvg zimg libwebp libvpx soxr fontconfig openssl
Required By: gst-libav mpd mpv neatvnc qt6-multimedia-ffmpeg wf-recorder
